_comment: Cursor reads `~/.cursor/mcp.json` (project-level: `<repo>/.cursor/mcp.json`). The `oz-policy-builder` entry below uses the same STDIO transport as Claude Desktop. To use the HTTP transport instead, point `url` at `http://<host>:<port>/mcp` and add `headers.Authorization = 'Bearer ${OZ_POLICY_MCP_TOKEN}'`.

env._OZ_POLICY_MCP_DATA_DIR: Optional persistence dir; see README.md for semantics.

_oz_policy_builder_http_example._comment: Alternative HTTP wiring. Cursor speaks SSE / Streamable HTTP transports; the bearer token MUST be supplied for the server's auth middleware to accept the request.
